admin.dashboard_subtitle: Operational summary across exchanges, orders and revenue.
admin.passkey_hint: Sign in securely and quickly with your saved passkey on this device.

admin.passkey_revoke_confirm: Revoke this passkey? It will no longer be usable for login.
admin.password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters.
admin.password_subtitle: Update the administrator password used for password login. Existing sessions are invalidated after a successful change.

admin.password_tip_manager: store in a password manager, never share

admin_dashboard_subtitle: Monitor platform activity, user growth, and recent operations in one place.
admin_health_empty_message: The health API returned no rows for the selected filters; no fixture services are shown.
admin_health_impact_api_keys: Exchange credentials and permissions can be checked.
admin_health_impact_balance_cache: Balance data freshness for exchange accounts.
admin_health_impact_balance_cache_missin: No balance cache account is registered.

admin_health_impact_snapshots: Snapshot polling diagnostics. Usually not a trading blocker.
admin_health_impact_user_stream: Private user-stream events are being ingested.
admin_health_subtitle: Trading readiness, data freshness, exchange access, and infrastructure diagnostics from the admin API.
admin_health_view_all_desc: Every backend health check returned by the admin API.
admin_health_view_data_desc: Balances, streams, and order state freshness.
admin_health_view_exchange_desc: API keys and exchange account connectivity.
admin_health_view_infrastructure_desc: API process, queues, and runtime diagnostics.
admin_health_view_orders_desc: Tracked orders and user-stream order ingestion.
admin_health_view_trading_desc: Checks that affect whether trading can run.
admin_setup_complete_required_first: Complete the required setup steps before locking setup.
admin_setup_exchange_id_hint: Lowercase CCXT identifier. Start typing to see suggestions.
admin_setup_exchange_step_desc: Register the first exchange venue. API credentials are intentionally configured later.
admin_setup_lock_behavior_hint: Completion disables setup-only writes and redirects this route back to the dashboard.
admin_setup_password_hint: Used to sign in to the admin console afterwards.
admin_setup_password_step_desc: Set the admin password before any protected admin route becomes available.
admin_setup_ready_to_lock: Required setup is complete. You can lock setup-only writes now.
admin_setup_review_step_desc: Review required setup only. API keys and runtime settings can be configured afterwards.
admin_setup_seed_missing_message: Reference data is missing and will be inserted before setup is locked.
admin_setup_seed_ready_message: Required seed data is already present.
admin_setup_seed_step_desc: Verify required reference data and insert missing exchanges, tokens, pairs, config, or strategy definitions.
admin_setup_subtitle: Create the admin access path, register one exchange, seed required reference data, then lock setup-only writes. Trading credentials and runtime tuning stay in their own settings pages.
admin_setup_trading_credentials_hint: API keys are not required to finish initial setup. Add and validate exchange credentials before market-making or order execution.
admin_api_keys_delete_message: Delete {name} on {exchange}? This cannot be undone.
admin_api_keys_empty_filtered_message: Clear filters or search for a different key, exchange, or fingerprint.

admin_api_keys_loading_message: Loading encrypted exchange API key readiness, validation status, and permissions.
admin_api_keys_secret_hint: Secret values are encrypted in the browser before submission.

admin_strategy_recent_activity_hint: Last updated strategy runs across all owners.
admin_strategy_stop_instance_body: This will immediately halt the strategy execution. You can resume it later.
admin_strategy_template_section_desc: Current view shows each definition's default config as a read-only legacy template. Dedicated template records should later live below a definition and be copied into snapshots at order creation.
admin_strategy_template_summary_desc: Reusable parameter presets derived from definitions until template storage is split out.
